chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 1887 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objections No.22, 25 & 29. 2. For orders on CMA No.5341/2023. 3. For hearing of main case. 4. For orders on CMA No.5342/2023. 13.05.2026 Matter is pending since 2023 without any progress and even notice has not been sought / issued till date. Applicant has made no effort since inception to have the mater listed or heard. Even today applicant is unrepresented without intimation or justification. It appears that applicant is not interested in the present proceedings. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, the reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
